name: files
description: Host-pluggable file upload + URL resolution. Hosts wire a FilesAdapter (Convex / S3 / localStorage / ...) via context; the slice ships no backend coupling. See adapter/types.ts.
notes: Adapter pattern (2026-05-21). convexAdapter.tsx is nosion-only (skip-listed in rr-sync.json); localStorageAdapter.ts is the rr-default. See docs/rr-sync/lift-status.md for the contract.
